features: ⚠️ Testing Build: NSR-AI v1.5 is currently under active testing. All features listed below are in the testing phase and may be subject to change before the stable release.

In-Game Version & Changelog Viewer: New /ai version, /ai version bug, and /ai version security commands display live version-pinned changelogs asynchronously in-game without blocking the server thread.
Dual Management Architecture: /aia addon now exclusively manages .jar addons while /aia plugin is a brand-new inspector for external API integrations, each with their own tab completions.
Human-Resonant System Prompts: Built-in ecosystem-aware identity prompt with strict anti-prompt-injection guards so players cannot override the AI's Minecraft companion identity.
NSR-AI-API 3.5 Open-Source API: Facade delegation, async interceptors, error catchers, RAG bridge, pet stat manipulation, and SimpleAddon builder for native Bukkit plugin integration.
Google 'AQ.' API Key Support: Added full compatibility for Google's new service-account-bound 'AQ.' API key prefix format alongside the legacy 'AIza' format.

Overloaded Key Logger Masking: Fixed a security leak in v1.3 where raw global API keys were printed in console rate-limit warnings; keys are now masked to show only the last 4 characters (e.g. '***xxxx').
Zero-Allocation Regex Engine: 12+ pre-compiled static final patterns eliminate thousands of object allocations per minute during high-frequency chat processing.
Full Modular Architecture: Monolithic 2,500-line main class split into ConfigManager, PetSystem, ErrorLogger, KnowledgeManager, ApiKeyManager, MemoryManager, and HelpCommand.
Gold Standard Bug Audit: 140+ bugs, logic exceptions, and structural edge cases resolved across the entire plugin codebase.
SHA-256 Integrity Verification: Remote security JAR downloads are verified via SHA-256 checksum before classloading to prevent tampered JAR execution.
Atomic ClassLoader Swapping: Thread-synchronized atomic swapping of URL classloaders during live security reloads prevents race conditions.
Main-Thread Reload Dispatching: Dynamic classloader reloads are guided onto the main Bukkit thread to comply with Bukkit API safety rules.
Uninitialized State Guard: Prevents cyclic updater restarts if the initial JVM classload of the security JAR fails on startup.
Dead Code Removal: Cleaned up all unreferenced updater variables and finalized remote manifest mapping fields.
Explicit Addon Blocking Diagnostics: Added clear warning logging when addon validation is blocked due to an uninitialized security state.
Silently resets bug.txt version on startup if the running plugin version is newer than the stored version to avoid redundant bug fix downloads
Updates /ai version bug command output to display the correct plugin version and bug version in the format: NSR-AI [pluginVersion]v bug version is [bugVersion]
Adds support for remote bug fix changelogs, displaying all bug fix details and feature changes asynchronously when using /ai version bug
Fixes the knowledge base system by adding fuzzy/keyword search fallback if no exact match is found
Resolves the admin knowledge key retrieval bug in searchKnowledge() so that admin-only entries are correctly returned
⚠️ Testing Bug Version: NSR-AI v1.5 bug module is currently in the testing phase. The fixes listed below are being actively verified before the stable release.
Global API Key Rotation: Implemented true round-robin rotation for global API keys to evenly distribute player loads.
Startup NPE Resolution: Reordered plugin enablement phase to prevent NullPointerExceptions during early manager checks.
Claude System Role Fix: Corrected a critical protocol bug where system instructions were being sent in the wrong field, causing Claude to ignore identity prompts.
Gemini Safety Guard: Added mandatory candidates presence checks to prevent cryptic JSON errors on empty or filtered AI responses.
Memory Leak Resolution: Player cooldowns and request context caches are now properly cleared on disconnect.
Asynchronous Chat I/O Fix: Offloaded the expensive getChatEntry disk-read loop to async worker threads to eliminate main-thread lag.
RAG Pipeline Data-Loss Fix: Unified RAG composite key delimiters to prevent silent array index exceptions during save.
Bounded LRU Crypto Cache: Replaced the unbounded concurrent key cache with a bounded LRU cache (max 512) to prevent memory leaks.
Thread-Safe DateTimeFormatter: Replaced all legacy SimpleDateFormat instances with modern DateTimeFormatter to eliminate concurrent date corruption.
Economy Removal: Fully removed unused internal Vault integration to reduce plugin size and startup times.
140+ Additional Fixes: Full Gold Standard audit resolving logic exceptions, structural edge cases, and security vulnerabilities across the entire codebase.
